I just realized you might not understand the definition of what vibe coding actually is:

Vibecoding is the act of telling the LLM to make a program for you, and then looking at it and telling the LLM to make changes. A key component of vibecoding is that you don't look at the code (hence "vibes")
record.originalText:
I just realized you might not be a programmer and understand what vibe coding actually is:

Vibecoding is the act of telling the LLM to make a program for you, and then looking at it and telling the LLM to make changes. A key component of vibecoding is that you don't look at the code (hence "vibes")

record.text:
Again, this is an important distinction because if you say "no, touching an LLM at all is vibes" all that will happen is people will block you and you won't change anyone's mind.

You have to make arguments based on what actual usage is like, which means knowing that usage and not your imagination

The situations most engineers use LLMs for (writing simple boilerplate, autocompleting individual lines, asking questions about the codebase, etc.) are explicitly not vibecoding because the "vibe" part of vibecoding refers to not seeing the code.

In those situations you DO very much see the code

Der Anime entsteht bei Diomedéa unter der Regie von Keizō Kusakawa (Parallel World Pharmacy, Happy Sugar Life). Die Serienkomposition übernimmt Wataru Watari (My Teen Romantic Comedy SNAFU, The Saint’s Magic Power Is Omnipotent), während das Charakterdesign von Masakazu Ishikawa (The Saint’s Magic Power Is Omnipotent, Ron Kamonohashi’s Forbidden Deductions) stammt. Die Soundregie liegt bei Yayoi Tateishi (The Gorilla God’s Go-To Girl) und Hayato Matsumura komponiert die Musik, während Heart Company für die Musikproduktion verantwortlich ist.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Tief im Wald lebt die geheimnisvolle Hexe Rose zurückgezogen in einer kleinen Hütte am See. In Wahrheit ist sie eine freundliche junge Frau, die von ihrer Großmutter die Kunst der Tränke gelernt hat und heimlich einen Ritter liebt. Als dieser plötzlich vor ihrer Tür steht und ausgerechnet einen Liebestrank für eine andere Frau verlangt, gerät Roses ruhiges Leben aus den Fugen. Trotz ihres gebrochenen Herzens beschließt sie, ihm zu helfen.

Why will so many vulnerable Americans lose their benefits? In short, both beneficiaries and states will be overwhelmed with new administrative burdens. In addition to cuts in the value of SNAP benefits, many beneficiaries will lose coverage because of added work requirements—which have been repeatedly shown to push eligible people off the program, but not improve labor force participation.

Others, however, will lose benefits because *state administrators* are facing new administrative burdens, which will push them to reduce their SNAP caseloads. The bill, by design, is forcing state governments to take the blame for millions of Americans going hungry.
